auth.fingerprintRequired: Please enable JavaScript or disable ad blocker to continue

register.title: Register
register.success: Registration successful. You are now signed in.
register.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
register.passwordMaxLength: Password must be at most 64 characters
register.passwordComplexity: Password must contain at least 3 of: uppercase, lowercase, digit, symbol

upload.dropzone: Drop PDF here or click to select
upload.loginHintQuotaExceeded: Anonymous upload quota exceeded. Please sign in (top right) to continue uploading.
upload.fileNotice: 🛡️ Your file is transmitted over encrypted connections. It is kept for 7 days for download, then permanently deleted from our servers.

translate.preprocessWithOcrHint: For scanned or image-heavy PDFs; text is recognized before translation.
translate.sameLangError: Source and target languages cannot be the same
translate.loginHintQuotaExceeded: Anonymous translation page limit reached. Please sign in (top right) to continue.
translate.selectBothLanguages: Please select both source and target languages

errors.pdf_font_unsupported: This PDF uses fonts that are not suitable for text extraction. Use a PDF with a text layer or run OCR first.
errors.tounicode_missing: This PDF is missing ToUnicode mapping. Use a PDF with a text layer or run OCR first.
errors.font_subset_corrupt: This PDF may have corrupt font subsets. Try re-exporting the PDF or run OCR first.
errors.no_paragraphs: No translatable paragraphs detected; the pages may be scanned or image-only. Try enabling “Preprocess PDF with OCR first”.
errors.ocr_preprocess_failed: OCR preprocessing failed. Ensure OCRmyPDF and Tesseract are installed, or try again later.

home.translationFailedNoDetail: Check worker logs for details or contact support.
home.translationFailedContact: Translation did not complete. For any questions or support, contact
home.deleteDocumentConfirm: This action cannot be undone. The file will be permanently removed from our servers. Continue?
home.translationPatience: Translation and AI model loading may take a moment for multiple pages. Thank you for your patience.
home.downloadError: This file could not be downloaded. Please sign in with the account that created this task and try again.
home.downloadErrorNotFound: Translation file not found. It may still be generating, or try again later.
home.uploadFileNotice: 🛡️ Your file is transmitted over encrypted connections. It is kept for 7 days for download, then permanently deleted from our servers.

task.viewAfterComplete: When translation is complete you can view source and translation here.
task.translationDoneHint: Translation complete. You can preview or download. Use left/right panes to compare pages.
task.targetGenerating: Translation in progress; it will appear on the right when ready.
task.failedRetryHint: You can retry later or try a different document/page range.
task.translationPatience: Translation and AI model loading may take a moment for multiple pages. Thank you for your patience.
task.backgroundTaskHint: The task is running in the background. You can close this page or do something else; come back when it's done.
task.longTaskHint: Long documents may take several minutes to translate. Thank you for your patience.
task.queuedWaitHint: Your task has been queued. Other tasks may be in progress; please wait a moment.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information when you use the translatepdfonline.com service.
privacy.section1Content: When you use our service, we may collect: login information (e.g., your Google account email, nickname), document metadata you upload (e.g., filename, size, page count), and necessary log information (e.g., request time, error codes).
privacy.section2Content: We use your information only to provide PDF translation services, including: processing uploaded documents, executing translation tasks, displaying task history and billing statistics, and improving product quality and troubleshooting.
privacy.section3Content: We do not sell your personal information to any third party. We share only when required by law, to comply with court or regulatory orders, or to protect our and users' legitimate rights.
privacy.section4Content: We use reasonable technical and administrative measures to protect your information, such as access control and encrypted transmission. Please note that no absolute security exists on the internet.
privacy.section5Content: You may request access, correction, or deletion of your personal information, and withdraw consent (e.g., stop using Google login). In some cases, we may retain certain records for legal or compliance reasons.
privacy.section6Content: If you have any questions or complaints about this Privacy Policy, please email
